child_failure_reason: No real SpiNNaker target is configured in this environment. pyNN.spiNNaker is installed, but sPyNNaker has no Machine target (no machineName, version, spalloc_server, remote_spinnaker_url, SPINNAKER_MACHINE, or SPALLOC_SERVER). Run inside a real SpiNNaker allocation or provide --spinnaker-hostname if that is the correct target for this EBRAINS job.
interpretation: source layout and v2.1 bridge runner are present; strict target precheck blocked before sim.run; hardware evidence was not attempted
recommended_fix: make hardware target precheck advisory for run-hardware; require real evidence via sim.run/readback/fallback metrics instead
